title: Prismatic Grain
description: Ce style se caractérise par des dégradés de couleurs lumineux et éthérés, associés à un grain numérique dense et uniforme, rappelant l'aérographe moderne ou l'impression risographique fine. Les formes sont définies entièrement par des champs de couleurs douces et des fuites de lumière plutôt que par des lignes, créant une atmosphère onirique, surréaliste et très tactile.
description_en: This style is characterized by luminous, ethereal color gradients blended with heavy, uniform digital grain, reminiscent of modern airbrushing or fine risograph printing. Forms are defined entirely by soft, glowing color fields and light leaks rather than line work, creating a dreamy, surreal, and highly tactile atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style se caractérise par des dégradés de couleurs lumineux et éthérés, associés à un grain numérique dense et uniforme, rappelant l'aérographe moderne ou l'impression risographique fine. Les formes sont définies entièrement par des champs de couleurs douces et des fuites de lumière plutôt que par des lignes, créant une atmosphère onirique, surréaliste et très tactile.
prompt: Digital airbrush illustration characterized by heavy uniform stipple grain and luminous soft gradients. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering technique relies entirely on smooth, glowing color fields and gradient meshes with absolutely no line work or harsh outlines. Forms and volumes are defined by contrasting hues and soft feathered transitions that gently dissolve into ambient light. The color palette features a dominant {{primary_color}} glow, contrasted with {{secondary_color}} midtones and vibrant {{accent_color}} highlights, creating a pastel-neon, prismatic, and iridescent color harmony. Lighting behaves like ethereal colored gels or light leaks, producing a high-key bloom effect that washes over the forms. The texture is highly tactile, mimicking fine risograph printing or high-ISO film grain, giving the smooth gradients a matte, stippled finish. Edges are soft and blurred, blending seamlessly into the surrounding space. The atmosphere is dreamy, tranquil, and surreal, emphasizing volumetric shading through color temperature rather than traditional shadow. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. digital airbrush, risograph texture, heavy grain, soft gradients, luminous color fields, ethereal lighting, no outlines, stippled finish, dreamy atmosphere, color gel lighting, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Digital airbrush illustration characterized by heavy uniform stipple grain and luminous soft gradients, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering technique relies entirely on smooth, glowing color fields and gradient meshes with absolutely no line work or harsh outlines. Forms and volumes are defined by contrasting hues and soft feathered transitions that gently dissolve into the ambient light of the {{background_color}} backdrop. Intentional overflow is permitted where parts of the subject can extend beyond the visible frame. The color palette features a dominant {{primary_color}} glow, contrasted with {{secondary_color}} midtones and vibrant {{accent_color}} highlights, creating a pastel-neon, prismatic, and iridescent color harmony. Lighting behaves like ethereal colored gels or light leaks, producing a high-key bloom effect that washes over the forms. The texture is highly tactile, mimicking fine risograph printing or high-ISO film grain, giving the smooth gradients a matte, stippled finish. Edges are soft and blurred, interacting smoothly with the flat {{background_color}} environment. The atmosphere is dreamy, tranquil, and surreal, emphasizing volumetric shading through color temperature rather than traditional shadow. digital airbrush, risograph texture, heavy grain, soft gradients, luminous color fields, ethereal lighting, no outlines, stippled finish, dreamy atmosphere, color gel lighting
background_prompt: A purely atmospheric background environment featuring luminous, soft color gradients and heavy uniform stipple grain. Abstracted, minimalist spatial planes are defined by a dominant {{primary_color}} glow, with {{secondary_color}} shadows and {{accent_color}} light leaks. The scene is devoid of sharp lines, relying on glowing color fields, ethereal colored gel lighting, and a dreamy bloom effect. The texture mimics fine risograph printing with a tactile, matte finish, creating a surreal, tranquil space.
background_prompt_removebg: A purely atmospheric background environment featuring luminous, soft color gradients and heavy uniform stipple grain, transitioning smoothly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. Abstracted, minimalist spatial planes are defined by a dominant {{primary_color}} glow, with {{secondary_color}} shadows and {{accent_color}} light leaks. The scene is devoid of sharp lines, relying on glowing color fields, ethereal colored gel lighting, and a dreamy bloom effect. The texture mimics fine risograph printing with a tactile, matte finish, creating a surreal, tranquil space. In the foreground, a soft-edged, glowing gradient overlay or abstracted stippled vignette frames the invisible subject, creating depth while interacting seamlessly with the {{background_color}} backdrop.
